notes: This fixture is anonymized from a real Axis Bank NRE CSV statement supplied by the project owner.
The original Axis CSV uses columns DR and CR, but observed balance movement indicates values in CR reduce balance and values in DR increase balance for this file.
Amounts, dates, row count, column structure, balances, and SOL are preserved for regression testing.
Names, account number, customer ID, contact details, PAN, CKYC, transaction references and counterparties are anonymized.
